text.title: FinOps — Reserved Instances / Savings Plans Commitment Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Required field set to null and other required fields missing.

list.item: baseline_months: must match integer minimum 3; otherwise reject.
commitment_kind: must match enum: standard-ri, convertible-ri, compute-savings-plan, ec2-instance-savings-plan; otherwise reject.
term_years: must match enum: 1, 3; otherwise reject.
base_coverage_percentile: must match integer 10..30; otherwise reject.
utilization_alert_pct: must match integer 70..90; otherwise reject.
staggered_renewal: must match boolean const true; otherwise reject.
